title: Render Studies
description: Four independent sketch-to-render studies spanning adaptive reuse, coastal architecture, museum interiors, and small urban storefronts.
creative_direction: Each image is a self-contained proof of layout-faithful rendering: the composition shows a believable architectural sketch transformed into a photoreal scene while preserving drawn proportions, openings, circulation, and material logic.

en.title: Render Studies
en.description: Four independent sketch-to-render studies spanning adaptive reuse, coastal architecture, museum interiors, and small urban storefronts.

zh-CN.title: 写实渲染单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立草图转写实研究,覆盖仓库改造、海边住宅、博物馆室内和城市小店立面。
